prompt: I have two models for predicting house prices: one is a simple linear regression (square footage + bedrooms), the other adds neighborhood as a hierarchical effect. Both have converged fine. How do I compare them and decide which to use? I have the InferenceData objects for both.
assertions: Uses az.compare() or az.loo() for LOO-CV comparison
Reports ELPD values with standard errors
Reports ELPD difference between models with its standard error (dse)
Interprets ELPD difference using magnitude thresholds (2x or 4x dse)
Checks and reports Pareto k diagnostics
Mentions stacking weights as a complementary tool
Suggests preferring the simpler model if models are indistinguishable
Provides a comparison table or structured output format
